name: Rakta Chandana (Red Sandalwood)
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Pitta and Kapha.
mainMedicinalUses: Superior for skin radiance and pigmentation removal.
Effective as an anti-pyretic for children's fevers.
plantProfile: Dark red wood found primarily in Andhra Pradesh.
preparationMethods: Paste application over face or affected skin.
